description: Structural contract for build-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas).

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: diff_summary
required_sections.fail_message: ## Changes (or ANCHOR:diff_summary) missing — Builder must document what changed

required_sections.name: test_results
required_sections.fail_message: ## Self-Verification (or ANCHOR:test_results) missing — Builder must report test outcomes

required_sections.name: quality_signals
required_sections.fail_message: ## Quality Signals missing — Builder must report quality signals

required_content.name: status_field
required_content.fail_message: **Status:** field missing — Builder must declare PASS or FAIL
